items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
#LouLou puffer#
LOULOU PUFFER Mini Quilted Calfskin Bag, the latest mini size from the boutique! Made from imported calfskin with a soft and delicate touch. Small and cute, like a cotton candy! Features a zippered interior pocket for phone and valuables, and a card slot. No extra interior pockets, but it has everything you need. Very convenient!
Size: 23x15.5x5.8cm
Model: 620333

Model: 57700
Size: 23x16x6cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
New arrival: 2020 IT BAG. A must-have that conquered the fashion world before it even launched. Inspired by the Paris street name Rue De Solferino! The bag features imported Italian fine pin-stripe Box calfskin with excellent texture and flexibility. The interior features a three-panel accordion pocket for daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter clasp opens vertically, completely redefining your perception of bag clasps. It's simply too fun!
Model: 2020
Size: 19x13x5cm

Size: 24
Model: 1964

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
🆕🆕YSL Saint Laurent has released a bestseller❗❗It has to be said that the (Saint Laurent) chain bag is on fire in the fashion world. This old French luxury brand possesses a unique magic, and the LOOK is full of highlights! Imported original calf leather, Italy-customized engraved logo hardware, every inch of detail is authentic using ZP standards! A favorite of celebrities, not only is the appearance high, but it is also a powerhouse![Smile][Smile][Smile]Size: 20×17×6cm, Model 1855
